summary: TWO_COLUMN: MCMC acceptance rate vs step σ for N(0, 1) target. 4 precomputed 2000-step runs with σ∈{0.1, 0.5, 1.5, 3.0}. LEFT always_redraw YELLOW trace curve. RIGHT BLUE target density + YELLOW histogram. ValueTracker sigma_idx_tr walks σ values. Live acceptance rate; 0.234 RGG optimality noted.
